description_long: This rifle features a striking combination of materials and colors, with a stock and foregrip that appear to be crafted from a wood-textured material accented by vibrant green and blue peacock-feather patterns. The receiver and barrel assembly are predominantly matte black, with gold highlights on the scope, magazine, and barrel components, lending a luxurious and custom appearance. The rifle is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on top, and a suppressor is attached to the end of the barrel, suggesting a design optimized for precision and stealth. The grip and cheek rest are ergonomically shaped, and the overall silhouette is modern and tactical. The magazine is integrated into the lower receiver, and the rifle's lines are clean and angular, with a mix of organic and geometric motifs. This object would stand out in any urban environment due to its unique aesthetic and high-contrast color palette.
description: A modern, custom rifle with a wood-textured stock, peacock-feather accents, matte black receiver, gold highlights, a scope, and a suppressor.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, highlighting the wood-textured stock, peacock-feather pattern, gold scope, and suppressor.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular suppressor, gold scope rings, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 but with the magazine and grip details more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view, focusing on the stock's wood texture and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
